overview: A full-stack admin blog management system built on Internet Computer. Features a Motoko backend with persistent blog storage, CRUD operations, category filtering, search, and pagination. The React frontend provides a polished admin dashboard with a multi-step blog editor using react-quill-new, stat cards, skeleton loaders, toast notifications, and smooth motion animations.
features: Admin dashboard with stat cards, search, and category filters
Blog table with pagination, skeleton loaders, and delete confirmation
Multi-step blog creation wizard (Basic Info, Content, Media)
Edit blog with pre-filled form and slug lock
Category badges with unique color coding
Full Motoko backend with persistent CRUD operations
